title: Arsenal Fixes
description: This Mod fixes some stuff about Arsenal.
body:
# Arsenal Fixes
This Mod fixes some stuff about Arsenal. **This mod doesn't work without [Arsenal](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal) and [Ratatouille](https://modrinth.com/mod/ratatouille)**.
## 
- 1.0 Version of the Mod:
  - Fixes the inability to pull back the Anchorblade at all. Now you can recall your Anchorblade no matter what.

### **NOTICE!!!**

If this mod has any issues, please report them **[HERE](https://github.com/CalinXD-mc/Arsenal-Fixes/issues)**, not on the official Arsenal repository.
